meta.title: Interests Explorations
meta.subtitle:
Like many CS students, I spent time figuring out what I actually wanted to build. I moved through cybersecurity, blockchain, and graphics programming — not always with a clear direction, but always paying attention to what resonated and what didn't.

Over time, a pattern emerged: the problems that kept pulling me back were visual, three-dimensional, and mathematically grounded. That realization led me to where I am now — building foundations in machine learning and computer vision, with a growing focus on 3D vision.

entries.heading: Deep Learning & Computer Vision (ML & CV)
entries.content: Focusing on deep learning architectures and computer vision. Using PyTorch to implement and experiment with neural networks while working to close the gap between mathematical theory and practical application.

projects.name: KODAMA
projects.desc: An egocentric scene understanding engine designed for uncontrolled environments.

projects.name: Binary Semantic Segmentation
projects.desc: Implemented U-Net and ResNet34-based U-Net for binary semantic segmentation, trained on the Oxford-IIIT Pet Dataset to classify pets within images.

entries.title: First half of year 2025
entries.heading: Computer Graphics
entries.content: Explored the 3D graphics pipeline and real-time rendering through OpenGL and GLSL shader programming. Worked with GPU memory management, spatial transformations, and lighting models to build a more concrete low-level programming foundation.

projects.name: CG-Robot
projects.desc: A C++ OpenGL application for rendering 3D scenes with support for animation, visual effects, and a graphical user interface. The project is structured around a clear separation of application logic, rendering, scene management, and effects.

projects.name: Texture-Mapping
projects.desc: A C++ application for viewing 3D meshes and performing texture mapping and painting. Built with OpenGL for rendering and ImGui for the interface, it supports face selection, patch creation, texture mapping, and direct texture painting on meshes.

entries.heading: Cyber Security & Cloud
entries.content: Explored cloud computing with a focus on security practices and infrastructure deployment on AWS.

projects.name: AI Guardian
projects.desc: A chat-based application for creating and managing AWS WAF configurations.

entries.title: 2022 - Early 2024
entries.heading: Cyber Security
entries.content: Focused on web security fundamentals and participated in CTF competitions to sharpen practical problem-solving skills.

entries.heading: The Beginning: Logic & OOP Foundations
entries.content: Started my software engineering journey with C++, learning the fundamentals of logic and object-oriented programming.
